violations.description: Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. - Hot hold unit was not turned on. Product temp was 114*/123*/130*. Since the cooking had taken place less than an hour ago, the food was not discarded. Informed the owner not to serve the food until the internal temp of the meats were back up above 135*F.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Plumbing/electrical not properly installed. The refrigerator needs to be unplugged in order to operate the handwashing and 3 compartment sink.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Handwashing sink was not being used. The sink was dry and not turned on at time of inspection.
